items.title: What do Trump's latest comments on leaving Nato mean for the alliance?
items.dek: Trump has criticised Nato members for showing a lack of support for US objectives in Iran.
items.body: Trump has criticised Nato members for showing a lack of support for US objectives in Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Families cram into Greek court for trial into deadliest train crash
items.dek: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.
items.body: Fifty-seven people were killed when two trains collided in 2023 in the worst rail accident in Greek history, with 36 accused in a trial expected to last years.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Explosions at Burundi ammunition depot kill civilians, witnesses say
items.dek: Powerful blasts destroyed homes and sparked panic in the city of Bujumbura on Tuesday night.
items.body: Powerful blasts destroyed homes and sparked panic in the city of Bujumbura on Tuesday night.
items.author: IriLine Desk
